subcodes.first_line: Pure praise and glorification beseemeth them that have recognized His unity, before whose might the limbs of the ungodly do tremble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ساذج حمد و ثنا موحدین را لایق و سزاست که از سطوتشان فرائص مشرکین مرتعد
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
